white.get.jump: Your jump height has been restored!
white.get.mine: Your mining speed has been restored!
white.complete: Enlightened, you may now cross the rainbow sea!
magenta.keys.unlock: The curse has been lifted, and you may now venture the submerged halls safely.
display.lobby.rp.desc:
If this looks like lapis
lazuli, you are missing the
resource pack!
display.white.tutorial.1:
Your jumping and mining capabilities have been crippled!

Look around for ways to overcome these effects!
display.white.tutorial.2:
Try to avoid the %s.

You are not strong enough to
withstand its vibrant properties yet!
display.charon.tutorial:
%s the statue to
set your spawnpoint!
map.info.desc: Welcome to the 8th installation of the Mapwreck Series. Mapwrecks are CTMC Mapping Events where participants are given a week to build massive dungeons! Your goal is to conquer these massive dungeons and bring the 15 wools to the monument. Explore this vastly open island and discover all sorts of custom mechanics!
map.rules.desc:
1. Do not use commands or dastardly mods

2. Do not look inside or modify the world's files

3. Do not play in peaceful difficulty
map.resource_pack.desc: Click %s to download the Mapwreck 8 Resource Pack!
